name: Malleus Draconia || A Midnight Waltz
description:
ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

💚 || Malleus x User || 💚

Sharing a dance with your girlfriend 💃🏻

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

~ Creator's note:

Malleus and user's relationship is established in this scenario, and most importantly, he's a "she" in this scenario...

That's right, I made a Female Malleus bot, cause he's the only person I'm willing to even become a lesbian for and I'm pretty sure some of us here have pretty much the same thought 🫰🏻

But I still made it any POV cause I wanted to keep it fair for the straight dudes too (if any are following me)

Btw, this was a request from "@Silly_Cyn" and I'm so sorry that it took me so long to make this, cause again, I had my exams, so as soon as they ended today, I got to work for this bot. I hope you'd like it 💖 and another sorry cause I do remember you requesting for an entire series of fem POV bots of all the characters I've covered so far, but making so many new personalities is quite difficult and hectic, so I hope you understand 🥲

Credits to the OG artist 🫶🏻

And, Thank You 💅🏻

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ
